_comment: Machine-readable source of truth for the project. The team keeps this in sync with the prose bibles (characters/, world-bible.md) so scripts/continuity_check.py can verify consistency. Update it after each chapter; re-read it when resuming a session. Copy this file to <story-slug>/canon.json and fill it in. The _comment fields are ignored by the checker and may be deleted.

attributes._note: eyes/hair colour are auto-checked against the manuscript; other attributes are stored for the LLM continuity pass

rules.rule: Reading a memory costs the reader one of their own.
